description: Compile upward-throw/projectile prompts into gravity-driven trajectories with apex, descent, and landing contact evidence.
physical_assumptions: The harness coordinate system is z-up.
Projectile bodies have gravity enabled after initial launch.
Horizontal velocity should carry the projectile forward unless drag is explicitly modeled.
The vertical trajectory should rise to an apex and then descend under gravity before ground contact.
verifier_rules: Projectile z increases after launch and later decreases.
Projectile x displacement is positive for positive x launch velocity.
Projectile must not float at the final frame without contact.
repair_suggestions: Set a structured initial velocity instead of keyframing the path.
Add ground collider and contact event capture.
Check z-up coordinate labels and frame timestamps.
